title: senecio disjectus
intro: Senecio disjectus, also known as Groundsel, is a plant species belonging to the daisy family (Asteraceae). The plant is used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial properties, which have been utilized to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Groundsel include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory problems, and support the immune system, making it a valuable herb for maintaining overall well-being. Groundsel is typically prepared in teas, tinctures, and infusions, allowing individuals to harness its medicinal properties and reap its health benefits.
